text.title: Competitive Positioning Failure Modes
text.summary: 4 antipatterns observed across deployments. Each pairs symptom + root-cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Positioning statement names 'legacy solutions'; sales reps complain they don't know what to compare against.
Claimed unique attribute ('cloud-native') matched by every competitor; positioning produces no preference.
antipattern.fix: Every unique attribute must be one named alternatives cannot truthfully claim.

antipattern.symptom: Procurement rejects pitch: 'faster and better' is unmeasurable.
antipattern.root-cause: Value translation not quantified per segment.
antipattern.fix: Quantify each unique-attribute → value translation (time saved, dollars made, errors avoided) per segment.

antipattern.symptom: Marketing targets 'innovators'; no one self-identifies; pipeline empty.
antipattern.root-cause: Best-fit customer described aspirationally, not concretely.
antipattern.fix: Name best-fit by company size, role, trigger event, budget signal.
